raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What's on your mind","name":"What's been most on your mind in your role lately, Toby?","description":"Safe opener that lets Toby set context before the conversation moves into growth specifics.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feels solid now","name":"What's feeling most solid in your design lead work right now?","description":"Surfaces what is stable and reliable in his current scope before probing for stretch.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Strategic hesitation","name":"Where do you find yourself holding back from taking a more visible strategic position?","description":"Explores the caution around stepping into org-level influence without naming the manager's internal diagnosis.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Named destination","name":"What kind of design leadership would make the next step feel real for you?","description":"Moves from vague ambition to a concrete picture of the next level Toby wants.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence target","name":"Where do you want your judgment to carry more weight across the org?","description":"Gets at the specific arenas where he wants broader influence and visibility.","purpose":"competency","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision ownership","name":"Which decisions do you want to own more directly at the next level?","description":"Surfaces the concrete calls and tradeoffs that define seniorer scope.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Cross-team friction","name":"Where does cross-team alignment still cost you the most time or energy?","description":"Identifies the recurring collaboration pain that limits broader impact.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sponsorship need","name":"What kind of sponsorship would actually change the way your work lands here?","description":"Explores whether external backing is the missing ingredient without assuming it is.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoff check","name":"What would you be willing to trade off to create more space for strategic work?","description":"Forces a real prioritization conversation about what must give if he wants broader influence.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"Given what we've talked through, what would you want to focus on first over the next two weeks?","description":"Closes on a concrete next move and turns the growth conversation into an actionable commitment.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
